nasb.text: Ahaz became the father of Jarah, and Jarah became the father of Alemeth, Azmaveth and Zimri; and Zimri became the father of Moza,

esv.text: And Ahaz fathered Jarah, and Jarah fathered Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri. And Zimri fathered Moza.

cnv.text: 亞哈斯生雅拉；雅拉生亞拉篾、亞斯瑪威和心利。心利生摩撒；

ccb.text: 亚哈斯生雅拉，雅拉生亚拉篾、亚斯玛威和心利，心利生摩撒，
